# Edge Cases Skill

This file exercises various edge cases.

## Unicode edge cases

Zero-width: [ZWSP] between brackets

Long dash — and ellipsis…

```html
<!-- not a real comment, inside code fence -->
```

`<!-- also not a comment, inline code -->`

## Multi-line HTML comments

<!-- This is
a multi-line
comment -->

## Multiple CDATA

<![CDATA[first]]> and <![CDATA[second]]>
